description: By using this tool, I got to know how easy it is to label the images and that too in a very efficient manner.
author: Anubhuti S.
pros: Most wonderful feature is Auto Labelling. Selecting an image or a video which is already done, similar to the one which needs to be tagged, makes the work super easy and time efficient. Review facility and zoom function are another added benefit.
cons: Rarely, video and audio issues occur but they are instantly solved by the helping team.

review_title: Labellerr - Best Data Annotation Platform Provider in the Market
description: Everything’s going well so far. No concerns or additions needed at this point. All looks excellent. Good.
author: Mathew P.
pros: Their Growth in the industry for the last 2 years and it is one of the easiest tool to use in the market for AI projects.
cons: All good for now. Everything looks fine and complete—there’s nothing else to add at this stage. Keep Going.

author: Vineeta M.
pros: Dashboard, objective type labelling, ease of getting training
cons: Not too many things to dislike, it's just the speed that needs to be smoothened

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Labeller is very user friendly and good even for beginners
cons: It would be better if there is an UNDO button

description: The team is really good and that made the experience good. They were quick to make changes which were required to improve the product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Amazing team, they quickly customize the product according to needs.2. They provide most of the tools required for annotations i.e. bouding boxes, keypoints, textual data etc.3. The vendor team associated with them for labelling is very quick with annotations and does the work on time. We never had any time related issues with them. They also learn to annotate quickly and the timely feedback improved them further.
cons: In the initial days, the product was slow had bunch of problems. But during 1 year of working with them, they have drastically improved the product. Now it works smoothly, much faster and supports a lot of things.

review_title: Great tool for decreasing workload of ML team
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Earlier, the team had been using manual annotation. Labeller has a clean UI with which we were able to outsource the labeling. UI for NLP is great and intuitive.
cons: The tool could be more fluent and have lesser lag at a few places. Some intelligence in the annotation would also have been better.

review_title: An intuitive and convenient labelling tool
description: Along with my text labelling process, the audio labelling tool is also quite useful. Developing a custom robust voice-recognition feature for my application was pretty straightforward using Labellerr. The segmentation and organisation of different labels in general enhanced the quality of my workflow.
author: Deep D.
pros: The features that stood for me about this software was it's ease of use and the way it seamlessly connected to my data sources. My use-cases were mostly Artificial Intelligence based, mainly in natural language processing. The text labelling section definitely sped up my process of developing the language model and thus enabled me to deliver on my projects on my time.
cons: The whole experience is quite hassle-free.

author: Jay R.
pros: Prompt customer support and ease of use.
cons: Sometimes a little slow, but got fixed on request.

description: Overall its a great experience on working this tool.
author: Sandeep K.
pros: The keypoint tool is very much interesting and its very easy to use. We can easily pan across the frame and zoon function is a great one.
cons: There is a little bit lag between submitting and loading of frames.

author: Srinivasa Rao V.
pros: This is good product and easy to use and features can be customised
cons: Handy and easy to use for regular jobs for customers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best annotation tools for machine learninc
author: Aswin M.
pros: We are a growing machine-learning startup in the public relations space. This solution is perfect for our data annotation and labeling needs. It is intuitive and easy to use while being feature rich. The team genuinely cares about our success and quickly follow up on any issues. Excellent mix of product and team.
cons: Every time we felt like an we had an issue with the workflow, the team quickly responded. More importantly, the implemented our feedback to make text annotation much more user friendly.

review_title: Best labelling tool with highest accuracy
author: Hanuj T.
pros: I really like the ease of use and accuracy that it works with. It has really made my job very easy and efficient.
cons: I haven't come across any cons as of yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rashik G.
pros: Labellerr is a beautifully crafted data annotation product. It has helped us tremendously in achieving our goals of the year. Labellerr team helped my colleagues to provide initial training and it has become integrated tool for our daily use. We have been using this tool for building deep learning models and data annotation for my AI research purposes in computer vision, NLP and speech recognition. I certainly recommend this product for great UX, quality output and excellent service by the Labellerr team.
cons: Labellerr is able to provide the services that are required. I can't think of a con at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It really made my work of labeling the images easier and in very efficient manner
author: Vaibhav A.
pros: Auto labelling and reviewing facility It could be easily used while the process of making almost any DL model
cons: Nothing, till now didn't found any such low poll

author: Praveen V.
pros: Highly Accurate Cost Benefits Time Saving
cons: Everything is good and great and can go long
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very Effective AI Data Labelling tool.
author: Keshav G.
pros: - Easy to use. - Some excellent auto-labelling features. - Multiple data type support like Image labelling, Text labelling, Audio and Video labelling. - Much better than other tools available in the market - Excellent customer support
cons: - Free trial period is short. - Hopefully, they will bring the vendor marketplace soon whereby as a customer I can choose the vendor myself.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedback on the excellent service called Labellerr
author: Alok B.
pros: The product was really easy to use. Pricing flexibility option is really praiseworthy.
cons: Took some time to integrate with other apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
